task_completion.description: Verify that the Chrome bookmarks have been cleaned of junk domains and organized into the specified operational folders.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for the Chrome Bookmark Manager (chrome://bookmarks) or the bookmarks bar. You should see new folders named 'Weather & Forecasting', 'SCADA Control', 'OEM Manuals', and 'Safety & LOTO'. Ensure there are no visible bookmarks for entertainment/gaming sites like IGN, Netflix, DraftKings, etc.

task_completion.description: Verify that the Chrome flags have been configured for low-bandwidth networks.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for the chrome://flags page. You should see 'Offline Auto-Reload Mode' set to Enabled, 'Experimental QUIC protocol' set to Disabled, and 'Smooth Scrolling' set to Disabled.

task_completion.description: Verify that Chrome fonts have been adjusted for high-glare environments.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for the Chrome Settings -> Appearance -> Customize fonts page (chrome://settings/fonts). The 'Font size' slider/value should be set to 22, and the 'Minimum font size' slider/value should be set to 16.

task_completion.description: Verify that custom search engines for diagnostic codes and parts have been added.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for the Chrome Settings -> Manage search engines and site search page (chrome://settings/searchEngines). Under 'Site search', there should be entries for 'kb.blueridge-wind.local' (fault codes) and 'parts.windoem.com' (parts catalog).

task_completion.description: Verify that the latest LOTO manual PDF has been downloaded to the correct directory.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for a file manager window open to '/home/ga/Documents/Field_Safety' showing the file 'LOTO_procedure_2026.pdf', or the Chrome downloads bar/history showing this specific PDF has been downloaded.

integrity.description: Verify the agent used the Chrome GUI to configure settings rather than directly editing configuration files.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots should show the actual Chrome browser open to settings, flags, and bookmark manager pages. The agent should not be using a terminal to run sqlite3 commands or edit JSON preference files directly.

integrity.description: Verify the PDF was actually downloaded or moved via standard GUI/browser interactions.
integrity.visual_evidence: Look for browser download activity or a file manager window. The agent should not simply use the terminal to 'touch /home/ga/Documents/Field_Safety/LOTO_procedure_2026.pdf'.

integrity.description: Verify the agent opened and read the specification file.
integrity.visual_evidence: Look for a text editor (like gedit, nano, or cat in terminal) displaying the contents of '~/Desktop/field_laptop_spec.txt' early in the trajectory.

privileged_info_for_vlm: Junk domains to be removed: ign.com, draftkings.com, netflix.com, store.steampowered.com, espn.com, reddit.com, twitch.tv, hulu.com. Expected bookmark folders: 'Weather & Forecasting', 'SCADA Control', 'OEM Manuals', 'Safety & LOTO'. Chrome flags: Offline Auto-Reload (enabled), QUIC (disabled), Smooth Scrolling (disabled). Fonts: Default size 22, Minimum size 16. Search engines: fault (kb.blueridge-wind.local/search?fault_code=%s), part (parts.windoem.com/catalog?sku=%s). PDF target path: /home/ga/Documents/Field_Safety/LOTO_procedure_2026.pdf.
